item.title: By the way, no such thing as a defensive weapon because every single defence of an aggressor enables those aggression
item.description:
By the way, no such thing as a defensive weapon because every single defence of an aggressor enables those aggression. Every single person understands this when their enemy is using something to defend themselves that someone else gave them, we should understand it when our “ally” does too#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I get hurled some of the worst insults, personal threats and intimidation whenever I speak on this issue, and that is how I know...
item.description:
I get hurled some of the worst insults, personal threats and intimidation whenever I speak on this issue, and that is how I know the exact nature of the monarchist movement, it matches the exact same nature of the thing they can’t condemn: the brutal Iranian monarchy.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Jerusalem day is “ celebrated” like this every year, and this action is not confined to this day#greenscreenvideo

item.title: ISRAEL SHOULD NOT BE ALLOWED TO, they cheat every time, they are violating the rules and they are ruining any fun this gay lil e...
item.description:
ISRAEL SHOULD NOT BE ALLOWED TO, they cheat every time, they are violating the rules and they are ruining any fun this gay lil euro summer thing would have

item.title: The split that is occurring is not radical leftists condemning Israel, it is fascists controlling Europe
